- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (created)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (user provided full stack and feature list)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (manual backend and frontend structure created)

- [x] Customize the Project (API, database schema, seed data, and UI built)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (none required)

- [x] Compile the Project (not run; user can run installs and scripts)

- [x] Create and Run Task (not needed for this project)

- [x] Launch the Project (awaiting user confirmation)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README created and comments added)

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
